---
title: 'Prayer List'
date: '2016-06-19T01:35:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '967971837681514435'
blogger_filename: '/p/prayer-list.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<h3>
Specific Items</h3>
<h4>
Core Unit</h4>
<div>
<ul>
<li>Flavia, Healing, Health, Renewed Vision and Focus</li>
<li>Connor, Peace and Calm and Rest</li>
<li>Preston, Peace with Connor, Assertiveness without violence.</li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
</div>
<div>
<b>Home</b></div>
<div>
<ul>
<li>Job that is Tailor Fit, More Than Enough, Allows for Idaho</li>
<li>Sell this house for a profit</li>
<li>15 Acres, on the lake, in Idaho</li>
<li>Moving Expenses</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<ul>
</ul>
</div>
<h4>
Family</h4>
<ul>
<li>Mom, Debbie, healing and job.</li>
<li>JoAnn and Rocky - Building a home.</li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
<h4>
Leaders.Pastors</h4>
<h4>
<div style="font-weight: normal;">
</div>
<ul style="font-weight: normal;">
<li>Pastor Mike Rima - Fullness for Lake City Vision</li>
<li>Pastor Robert Morris, Feed and Restore</li>
<li>Pastor George Pearsons</li>
<li>Pastor Art Aragon</li>
<li>Pastor Jerry Dirmann</li>
<li>Pastor Stewart Roberts</li>
<li>Pastors around the USA and World.&nbsp;</li>
<ul>
<li>Pastor Wycliffe Wakhungu</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div>
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><br /></span></div>
</h4>
<h4>
Leaders.Social.Civic.Government</h4>
<ul>
<li>Our Government, Clarity and Shalom</li>
</ul>
<br />
